MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by Jimmy Newell
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shauna Rash is present.
Attorney Agatha Ibarra Panday representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May 13, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
